description: The AudioVolumeSettings is a Legacy component previously used for settings in the game.

fields.MasterVolume: The volume setting for everything in the game.
fields.SoundEffectVolume: The volume setting for sound effects in the game.
fields.MultimediaVolume: The volume setting for multimedia in the game.
fields.VoiceVolume: The volume setting for voices in the game.
fields.UserInterfaceVolume: The volume setting for the user interface in the game.
